title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package that plugs Ollama into LangChain LLM, embeddings, and tool-calling pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-web)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for any Ollama model; runs in a single Docker container.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with builder-style API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and shell commands.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that turns any Ollama model into an inline coding copilot with autocomplete and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit to chat with your documents offline.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async/await and native JSON streaming.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module to cache and serve Ollama models inside your pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel wrapper providing a fluent facade and Artisan commands to manage Ollama models from PHP.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP library with GenServer-backed connection pooling for Ollama chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate exposing strongly-typed Ollama endpoints with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection.
